Interface IInputEditorFactory

Defines a factory responsible for creating input editor instances.

The IInputEditorFactory interface is implemented by the UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.Editors
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IInputEditorFactory
Remarks

This factory provides a centralized way to create UI editors for different data types. Each editor type is identified by an InputEditorId.

Consumers can either use the generic Create(InputEditorId) method or dedicated methods such as CreateTextEdit() and CreateDateTimeEdit() for strongly-typed editor creation.

The lifetime of created editors is managed by the consumer. Each call returns a new, independent instance.

Properties

SupportedTypes

Gets the collection of input editor types that are supported by this factory.

Declaration
IReadOnlyCollection<InputEditorId> SupportedTypes { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IReadOnlyCollection<InputEditorId>
Remarks

This collection represents the complete set of editor types that can be successfully passed to Create(InputEditorId). Consumers can use this information to determine which input editor is appropriate for a given scenario.

Methods

Create(InputEditorId)

Creates a new IInputEditor instance for the specified editor type.

Declaration
IInputEditor Create(InputEditorId type)
Parameters
Type Name Description
InputEditorId type

The input editor type to create. The value must be one of the types exposed by SupportedTypes.
Returns
Type Description
IInputEditor

A newly created IInputEditor instance.
Remarks

Each call to this method returns a new, independent input editor instance. The lifetime of the returned editor is owned by the caller.

Implementations must guarantee that the returned object:

  • Inherits Control.
  • Implements IInputEditor.
  • Is fully initialized and ready for use.
Exceptions
Type Condition
NotSupportedException

Thrown if the specified type is not supported by this factory.

CreateBooleanEdit()

Creates a boolean input editor.

Declaration
IBooleanEditor CreateBooleanEdit()
Returns
Type Description
IBooleanEditor

A new instance of IBooleanEditor.

CreateColourEdit()

Creates a color input editor.

Declaration
IColourEditor CreateColourEdit()
Returns
Type Description
IColourEditor

A new instance of IColourEditor.

CreateDateTimeEdit()

Creates a date-time input editor.

Declaration
IDateTimeEditor CreateDateTimeEdit()
Returns
Type Description
IDateTimeEditor

A new instance of IDateTimeEditor.

CreateNumericEdit<T>()

Creates a numeric input editor for the specified numeric type.

Declaration
INumericEditor CreateNumericEdit<T>()
Returns
Type Description
INumericEditor

A new instance of INumericEditor configured for type T.
Type Parameters
Name Description
T

The numeric type (for example, int, double).

CreateTextEdit()

Creates a text input editor.

Declaration
ITextInputEditor CreateTextEdit()
Returns
Type Description
ITextInputEditor

A new instance of ITextInputEditor.

CreateTimeSpanEdit()

Creates a time span input editor.

Declaration
ITimeSpanEditor CreateTimeSpanEdit()
Returns
Type Description
ITimeSpanEditor

A new instance of ITimeSpanEditor.
